_comment: Labeled retrieval eval set. target = corpus id a paraphrase SHOULD match; null = true negative (domain not in corpus, must NOT serve/ground). Hard pairs are intentional (paste-bin vs url-shortener; the two trading designs; self-host vs city-tool).

queries.text: A pastebin clone: people drop in some text and get back a short link to read it later. Mostly reads, light writes, public.
Let users paste a snippet and share a URL that shows it. Low traffic, read-heavy, content is public.
A link shortener with an API to mint short codes and a very high-volume redirect endpoint.
Service that turns long URLs into short ones and handles huge redirect traffic on lookup.
A Linktree-style page builder: users sign up, make a public profile of links, and see click analytics.
Let creators build a public bio page listing their links with basic click stats. Low traffic at first.
An image-sharing app where uploads are processed in the background for thumbnails and moderation.
Users upload photos; we async-generate thumbnails and run content moderation on each.
A chat backend with persistent websockets, fan-out to rooms, and stored message history.
Realtime messaging: long-lived socket connections, broadcast to room members, persist messages.
A checkout API: cart, place order, charge via a third-party payment processor, decrement inventory.
Online store backend handling carts, orders, external payments, and stock updates.
A notification service: a webhook receives an inbound event and fans out emails/SMS to users.
Inbound webhook triggers notifications delivered across channels to many recipients.
An endpoint that receives TradingView alerts and forwards the trade data onward, plus a public dashboard to view trades.
A stateful single-writer bridge that takes TradingView webhooks and places live orders on a broker via OAuth, with token refresh and a position gate.
Self-host one Node Fastify app in a single Docker container with SQLite on a cheap box.
An SSR Next.js app with a Postgres+PostGIS database and a headless-Chromium render service, cost-optimized, scaling toward 1000 cities.
A machine-learning training pipeline for fine-tuning large language models on GPU clusters.
An IoT platform ingesting telemetry from millions of sensors with time-series storage.
A video transcoding service that converts uploads into multiple streaming bitrates.
A multiplayer game server with matchmaking, lobbies, and real-time leaderboards.
A payroll system computing taxes and issuing direct-deposit payments on a schedule.
